description: Datalab hints attached to a field via ``json_schema_extra``.

datalab_include_field_in_summary.description: Also show this field in list/summary views.
datalab_include_field_in_summary.title: Datalab Include Field In Summary

datalab_hidden.description: Store but don't render this field (e.g. a companion unit field).
datalab_hidden.title: Datalab Hidden

datalab_multiline.description: Render a string as a multi-line textarea.
datalab_multiline.title: Datalab Multiline

datalab_section.description: Group fields sharing this section string into their own card.
datalab_section.title: Datalab Section

datalab_ref_types.description: Render an item-reference widget restricted to these item types.
datalab_ref_types.title: Datalab Ref Types

datalab_unit_field.description: Companion field holding the unit; renders a value box + unit dropdown.
datalab_unit_field.title: Datalab Unit Field

datalab_exclude_from_db.description: Don't persist this field to the database (block models).
datalab_exclude_from_db.title: Datalab Exclude From Db

datalab_exclude_from_load.description: Don't populate this field when loading from the database (block models).
datalab_exclude_from_load.title: Datalab Exclude From Load

title: DatalabFieldExtra
